sentences.arabic: شَعَرَ خَالِدٌ بِأَلَمٍ فِي رَأْسِهِ هَذَا الصَّبَاحَ.
sentences.translation: Halid je osjetio bol u glavi jutros.
sentences.translationEn: Khalid felt a pain in his head this morning.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ إِلَى الصَّيْدَلِيَّةِ لِيَشْتَرِيَ الدَّوَاءَ الْمُنَاسِبَ.
sentences.translation: Otišao je u apoteku da kupi odgovarajući lijek.
sentences.translationEn: He went to the pharmacy to buy the appropriate medicine.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ لَهُ الصَّيْدَلِيُّ: خُذْ هَذِهِ الْحُبُوبَ بَعْدَ الْأَكْلِ.
sentences.translation: Farmaceut mu je rekao: Uzmi ove tablete nakon jela.
sentences.translationEn: The pharmacist told him: Take these pills after eating.
